caption: The video begins with a close-up of an intricately designed wooden wheel, featuring a central hub with radiating spokes and small spherical elements along the rim, set against a textured green background. The scene then transitions to a man standing at a podium, delivering a speech. He is dressed in traditional attire, consisting of a white kurta and a beige vest, and he gestures with his hands as he speaks. The backdrop behind him is a patterned green wall, and there is a decorative column with a glass enclosure containing red flowers to his right. The setting suggests a formal or ceremonial event, possibly a political or cultural address.
